title: Seizing The Kingdom: Why violent men try to seize the kingdom
description: A profound exploration of the hidden tension between force and surrender, Seizing The Kingdom unveils why men, driven by a deep spiritual hunger, attempt to grasp what can only be received. It reveals that the true battle is not outward conquest, but inward transformation—where the ego resists, yet the soul longs to yield. In the end, the kingdom is not taken by strength, but revealed through surrender.
